case_title: SON, HYUNG WOO VS MEI, YANG CHU IND'L & DBA JAVA SOURCE COFFEE HOUSE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MEI, YANG CHU IND'L & DBA JAVA SOURCE COFFEE HOUSE SANG, SAM UN  IND'L & DBA JAVA SOURCE COFFEE HOUSE THE CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF HYUNG WOO SON IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF SON WAS NOT A PARTY TO THE SUBJECT CONTRACT. THE CONTRACTING PARTY WAS A.N.Y GLOBAL, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SON, HYUNG WOO AS TO DEFENDANT MEI, YANG CHU IND'L & DBA JAVA SOURCE COFFEE HOUSE SANG, SAM UN  IND'L & DBA JAVA SOURCE COFFEE HOUSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
